ast.name: innerText
ast.source: You can enter rich text annotations using Markdown just the same way you do in Obsidian.                 Once you are finished editing, the Markdown annotation will be rendered correctly.
ast.target: 您可以使用 Markdown 编写富文本注释，就像在 Obsidian 中一样。编辑完成后，Markdown 注释将正确呈现。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: You can directly link notes inside your                 vault by adding Obsidian links such as
ast.target: 您可以通过添加 Obsidian 链接（如：vault:note）直接链接到您的笔记。

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Create Backup
ast.target: 创建备份

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Export
ast.target: 导出

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Import
ast.target: 导入

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Delete
ast.target: 删除

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: With this option enabled, you can select a Markdown file in your vault to                 contain your personal annotations for the installed plugins. This feature is intended                 for power users who prefer to edit annotations directly from a Markdown file.                 A second advantage of this mode is that if you use links to some of your notes in                 the vault, those links will be automatically updated if your notes are later renamed.
ast.target: 启用此选项后，您可以在您的保险库中选择一个 Markdown 文件以包含安装插件的个人注释。此功能旨在为喜欢直接从 Markdown 文件编辑注释的高级用户服务。此模式的第二个优点是：如果您在保险库中的笔记使用了链接，则当这些笔记稍后被重命名时，这些链接将自动更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this option is enabled, the placeholder text will be deleted                     automatically when you start typing a new annotation. If disabled,                     the placeholder text will be selected for easier replacement.                     This is a minor customization.
ast.target: 如果启用此选项，当您开始输入新注释时，占位符文本将自动被删除。如果禁用，则占位符文本将被选中以方便替换。这是一个次要的自定义设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this option is enabled, aclickable icon linking to the plugin's GitHub page will be displayed in the Community plugin pane.
ast.target: 如果启用此选项，在社区插件面板中将显示一个可点击图标链接到插件的GitHub页面。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this option is enabled, whenever a plugin is uninstalled, the                 attached personal annotation is automatically removed.                 If this option is disabled, you can still  manually remove the personal                 annotations of any plugin that is no longer installed.                 The list of the no longer installed plugins is shown below, when the list is not empty.
ast.target: 如果启用此选项，每当卸载插件时，附带的个人注释将自动被删除。如果禁用，则您仍然可以手动移除不再安装的插件的个人注释。当列表不为空时，以下面显示的未安装插件列表为例。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you plan to reinstall the plugin in the future,                 it is recommended not to remove your annotations, as you can reuse them later.
ast.target: 如果您计划将来重新安装该插件，建议不要删除您的注释，因为您可以稍后重用它们。

regex.source: `Choose the annotation label for the ${B} version of Obsidian.                 Use HTML code if you want to format it. Enter an empty string if you want                 to hide the label. Use `

regex.source: "Use the backup button to create an internal backup copy.                 You can customize the names of existing backups by clicking on their names once you have created them."
regex.target: "使用备份按钮创建内部备份副本。                  创建它们后，您可以单击现有备份的名称来自定义其名称。"

regex.target: " 使用导出和导入按钮将当前设置和注释复制到外部文件，并且反过来，从外部文件恢复它们。"
